steps.t: Skarding can be found at Thokvist. You should talk to Skarding.
Locations to scout can be found nearby Thokvist in Misthallow. You should scout Misthallow for Skarding.
Locations to scout can be found nearby Thokvist in Misthallow. You should scout Misthallow for Skarding.
Locations to scout can be found nearby Thokvist in Misthallow. You should scout Misthallow for Skarding.
Egraedir can be found in Misthallow. You should greet Egraedir.
Egraedir can be found in Misthallow. You should talk to Egraedir.
Small stones can be found in Misthallow. You should gather the stones for Egraedir.
Egraedir can be found in Misthallow. You should return to Egraedir with the stones you have collected.
Fanglind can be found at Thokvist. You should talk to Fanglind.
